programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women: An Inconvenient Marriage
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion; it can drive women to unthinkable crimes of passion. Hate however, is love's gloomy shadow, and it can drive women into the darkest corners of their mind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: My Haunted House

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Erin and her husband are terrorized by restless spirits after they stumble upon an old mineshaft on their new property.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Linda and her sister discover an old rundown house in the woods with a murderous history; Carlos Mencia is nearly shot and killed when a spirit from his past comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Tom gets more than what he bargained for when he stays overnight in a haunted museum; while recording a record, Anthony is visited by a spirit who has recently crossed over.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Violated Me!

programme.desc: Desmond believes that his ex Cassandra is making up a story about him touching their child because she's jealous of his new fiancée. And later, Tammy has been investigated for child abuse and even accused of locking her kids in a closet.

programme.desc: A French interpreter urgently needs the detective, as criminals try to take him to their hide out.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own fingerprint, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants go to a meat locker to learn about cuts of beef. The teams race to impress chef Ramsay when they are asked to put their newfound knowledge to the test.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The 13 remaining chefs compete in two teams to feed 50 hungry kids from a football and cheerleading program. The losing team will have to clean the kitchens and finish prep work for the service challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay asks the chefs to create three Asian-fusion dishes using poultry, seafood and beef. Both teams crack under pressure when they go head-to-head during the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must prepare food for a bar mitzvah. After one contestant is eliminated, the top 10 chefs are revealed.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay tests the chefs' palates. Celebrity diners Eric McCormack and Robert Patrick stop by for dinner, bringing tensions to a boil.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness

programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette and her team continue their investigation into Chirk Mill, where one entity seems eager to play a tune.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Boomerang Becca

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Life of Si

programme.title: Arthur: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal
programme.desc: It’s Lakewood Elementary Parents Open House! How will the kids survive a whole evening of their parents' embarrassing antics? Buster is the only kid in Elwood City who doesn't have a Cybertoy, so he decides to 'borrow' one from the store.

programme.title: Arthur: Around the World in 11 Minutes/Muffy and the Big Bad Blog
programme.desc: Pal, Baby Kate, Amigo, and Mei Lin enthusiastically accept Nemo's dare to travel around the world and make it back in 11 minutes. Then, Muffy discovers that web blogging is a great way to keep her readers up to date with her every move.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team
programme.desc: In D.W.’s heart lurks one big, gnawing desire--TO GET RID OF THOSE TRAINING WHEELS! Then, can Coach Frensky work with a baseball team where everyone is fighting about who gets to be pitcher and no one wants to practice?

programme.title: Arthur: Caught in the Crosswires/Framed
programme.desc: Muffy is thrilled when mega producer J3 chooses her family for his latest reality TV project. After all, she was born to be star! Buster has just won the best young artist award at the Elwood City Arts Festival.

programme.title: Arthur: Based on a True Story (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: There's a new kid in town: Ladonna Compson, the Louisiana native with the gift of gab. Ladonna charms Arthur and friends with her amazing "true" stories. But are her stories really fact…or fiction?

programme.title: Arthur: The Blizzard/The Rat Who Came To Dinner
programme.desc: A blizzard comes to town, taking out the electricity and sending residents scrambling for supplies. Can neighbors find ways to help each other survive through the storm? Then, the unthinkable is happening...Arthur's teacher is moving in!

programme.title: Arthur: The Pageant Pickle/Some Assembly Required
programme.desc: School is almost out and Arthur can hardly wait for those lazy summer days by Muffy's pool. Nothing could ruin such a happy time of year, except maybe D.W.'s Spring Pageant! And then D.W. can't wait to test out her new play set!

programme.title: Arthur: Bud's Knotty Problem/That’s MY Grandma!
programme.desc: When Bud falls in love with a snazzy new pair of boots, he might face his toughest adventure yet - learning to tie his shoes. D.W. gets jealous when Grandma Thora becomes the most popular babysitter in town.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. Everyone is anxiously awaiting Mrs. Matuma’s Harambee Dance Troupe to arrive.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Your Birthday, Barney
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Layla and her friends celebrate her birthday in the park with foods that aren’t traditionally American.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On Again, Off Again
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about "on" and "off" by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJ’s beloved scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All Aboard
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Split-Second
programme.desc: Carter, April and the Turtles investigate a break-in at the Antique Timepiece Museum. Convinced that Dregg is responsible, the Turtles discover a clue on a wall display.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Carter the Enforcer
programme.desc: Splinter convinces the Turtles that it is their duty to fight evil, even when the whole world is against them. Carter and the Turtles team up with April to get the goods on Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of Dregg
programme.desc: While the Turtles work on using fragments of the Vortex Crystal to stabilize their mutations, Lord Dregg plans to use the fragments to create another Vortex Crystal to power his Vortex Transporter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: While Raphael, Michelangelo, Donatello and Carter work on restoring Leonardo to his regular self, Mung steals all the plutonium from a power plant in order for Dregg to build a Plutonium Ray to turn Leonardo into a radioactive killer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Power of Three
programme.desc: Mungg informs Dregg that he came across two individuals who claimed they were old acquaintances of the turtles: Shredder and Krang!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Turtle in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles', Shredder's and Krang's battles skills, powers, and memories are absorbed into Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles to the Second Power
programme.desc: Dregg and his crew plan an invasion of Earth to make it his new home base, but first he has to get his transporter chip back from Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Day the Earth Disappeared
programme.desc: With the city breaking apart, the Turtles head to the street to investigate and see the Dreggnaut appear in the sky. With Mung's help, Dregg reprograms the transporter to open a warp in space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Lord Dregg launches a final attack on the Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Tracks
programme.desc: April O'Neil, ace reporter for Channel 6, investigates recent break-ins, allegedly by Ninjas, which have resulted in the thefts of numerous technologies.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: What Doesn't Kill You
programme.desc: Two childhood friends from South Boston turn to crime as a way to get by, ultimately causing a strain in their personal lives and their friendship.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: King of the Club: Part 3
programme.desc: The ClubWPT King of the Club series qualifies 16 lucky players to a live World Poker Tour event, where they compete in an invitational tournament under the bright lights of the WPT final table.

programme.title: King of the Club: Part 4
programme.desc: The ClubWPT King of the Club series qualifies 16 lucky players to a live World Poker Tour event, where they compete in an invitational tournament under the bright lights of the WPT final table.

programme.title: King of the Club: Part 7
programme.desc: The ClubWPT King of the Club series qualifies 16 lucky players to a live World Poker Tour event, where they compete in an invitational tournament under the bright lights of the WPT final table.

programme.title: King of the Club: Part 8
programme.desc: The ClubWPT King of the Club series qualifies 16 lucky players to a live World Poker Tour event, where they compete in an invitational tournament under the bright lights of the WPT final table.

programme.title: Vampire's Kiss
programme.desc: Teetering on the edge of sanity, volatile literary agent Peter Loew (Nicolas Cage) tries to find purpose in his life through a cutthroat work ethic and a hedonistic night life.

programme.title: Fast Food Nation
programme.desc: The hit satirical mockumentary taking a deep dive into the health issues and social consequences of America's love affair with fast food.

programme.title: Playing it Cool
programme.desc: Unrequited love motivates a guy to write about his experiences.

programme.title: Red Roses of Passion
programme.desc: Jaded Carla drugs her stuck up aunt and her daughter with mind-altering aphrodisiac concocted from a rose by an ominous Pan sex cult. The women become crazed nymphos and the only way to cure them is for Carla to give herself to "Pan".

programme.title: Trauma
programme.desc: In this heart-pounding thriller by Italian horror legend Dario Argento, a young man tries to help an escaped psychiatric patient find the serial killer who murdered her parents.

programme.title: Supervixens
programme.desc: Clint Ramsey has to flee after his wife is murdered by psycho cop Harry Sledge. While travelling, Clint gets sexually harassed on all sides by various voluptuous nymphomaniacs, and it all ends in a literally explosive climax.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: G.W. McLintock is a man with a reputation as wide as the desert, is as wealthy as any man could wish to be and is about to fall into trouble deeper than the Grand Canyon. Starring: John Wayne, Maureen O'Hara, Patrick Wayne

programme.title: Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: This ambitious frontier epic features a lawman (Kris Kristofferson) and a hitman (Christopher Walken) who fight in a tragic class war between ranchers and starving immigrants.

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Cord McNally searches for the traitor whose treachery caused the defeat of McNally's unit and the loss of a close friend. Starring: John Wayne, Jorge Rivero, Jennifer O'Neill

programme.title: The Case: A French Cold Case
programme.desc: The murder of 16-year-old schoolgirl Christelle Maillery, committed at Le Creusot in 1986.

programme.title: The Case: A Killer on the Loose
programme.desc: Susanna Zetterberg, a 19-year-old Swedish girl abducted as she left a Parisian nightclub,

programme.title: The Case: The Last Tango (Bertrand Gelineau)
programme.desc: In November 2006, the relatives of Nicole Saada, a woman in her sixties, came to report her disappearance.

programme.title: The Case: A Crime Too Perfect (Stephane Fournier)
programme.desc: It all started on the night of February 26 to 27, 2012. It was half past midnight when Stéphane Fournier arrived at the forest of Saint Lambert des Bois.

programme.title: The Case: The Treiber Affair
programme.desc: In 2004, a female couple disappears.

programme.title: The Debt Collector
programme.desc: French is a martial artist that takes on a job as a mob debt collector in order to make ends meet. He does whatever it takes to chase down individuals until he meets a bartender that makes him question whether he should do the right thing.

programme.title: The Reunion
programme.desc: After the death of her father, a daughter fulfills his last wish and finds a way to bring her three brothers back together... Sam, a hardened cop. Leo, a loud-mouthed overbearing bail bondsman. And Douglas, a twenty-year old thief fresh out of prison.

programme.title: The Outsider
programme.desc: Craig Fairbrass stars as Lex, who has been told that his daughter has died in LA. However, he finds that the body isn't his daughter, and that an internet fraudster has her hostage. Lex wreaks havoc through the streets of LA trying to find her.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, Terminal follows the twisting tales of two assassins carrying out a sinister mission (Max Irons & Dexter Fletcher), a teacher battling a fatal illness (Simon Pegg), an enigmatic janitor (Mike Myers)...

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards including BEST PICTURE, A car accident brings together a group of strangers in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Space Truckers
programme.desc: A space trucker and his cute fiancee are on their way from a space station to Earth with an unknown cargo. When space pirates hijack them, 5000 disintegrator robots are found in the cargo.

programme.title: Futra Days
programme.desc: After undergoing an experimental time travel "process" that sends a man into his future, he investigates the man he has become, by engaging in a romance with his future self's girlfriend in a mind-bending reality.

programme.title: Life Like
programme.desc: An idealistic, attractive young couple acquires a stunning, life-like robot for guilt-free help; but, as the three grow closer, their perception of humanity will be altered forever.

programme.title: The Adventurer: Curse of the Midas Box
programme.desc: Transporting you to a rambunctious realm of enchanting fantasy. When Mariah's little brother is kidnapped, he follows a trail of clues to discover a hidden realm of monsters, ancient secrets and a long-lost artefact. Feat: Michael Sheen & Sam Neill.

programme.title: Kids From Planet 62F
programme.desc: Four friends find an object with special powers that belongs to two alien kids from the planet 62F. Now they must race to get it back to its rightful owners, but NASA are on their tail and they will stop at nothing to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Classic story of a little Swiss girl, who after the death of her parents is sent to live with her goat herding grandfather (Max Von Sydow) in the high Alpine mountains.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Two bombs are set off while Sam, Spike and Raff are responding to a Hot Call at an office building, trapping them and nine civilians inside with a third seemingly non-diffusible bomb.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One has an unusual case when a passenger jet is hijacked by a group demanding the release of a prisoner.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One responds to 911 call where a masked gunman threatens a group of teens and kidnaps one of them.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One thinks they have a simple case of robbery on their hands,but things get complicated when the victim sabotages the rescue.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One is alerted to a situation in a bank where a woman who appears under duress is withdrawing all her money. When she sabotages her own rescue and escapes with her tormentor, the team turn their attention to her family, who is also in danger.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dance of the Mayflies
programme.desc: Andromeda rescues dying people from a drift, but they soon turn into zombies being controlled by a hive-mind.

programme.title: Andromeda: In Heaven Now Are Three
programme.desc: The engine of creation is capable of rewriting the universe according to the owner's wishes. Dylan, Beka and Trance must obtain it before someone with dark plans gets it.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Things We Cannot Change
programme.desc: A black hole knocks out Dylan and sends him into an alternative reality with a wife and child.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown
programme.desc: The crew rescues one of the long-lost founders of the Commonwealth, but discovers she may be more trouble than she is worth.

programme.title: Andromeda: Belly of the Beast
programme.desc: A mythological space monster tries to eat the Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Knight, Death and the Devil
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to liberate a fleet of captured ships, but the fleet isn't sure it wants to be liberated. Their AIs fear that new captains will enslave them.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Ladakh
programme.desc: Ladakh, the most northern state of India, is one of the harshest environments in the world.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Laos
programme.desc: Landlocked and shrouded in historical mystery, Laos is home to dozens of forgotten tribes who reside in its vast rolling mountains and impenetrable jungles.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Vietnam
programme.desc: We are in the Quan Hoa mountains in the Northwest of Vietnam. It is one of the poorest and most isolated regions in the country.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Cameroon
programme.desc: The bravest drivers in Cameroon are named the “Clandos”; the name comes from the word clandestine or illegal.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: China's Dragon Road
programme.desc: In the south of China, in the Guizhou province, mountains cover 90% of the land. Within these mountains, two of the region's most vital and abundant resources are found.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Congo Katanga
programme.desc: In Katanga, many people are waiting for a train named after a bird, the “Swallow”. More than 2,000 people, three times the train’s capacity, are squeezing in the carriages.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Frozen Four
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town. But a controversial decision results in the DC-4 becoming stranded and frozen solid on a High Arctic airstrip.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice is still suffering from a loss of nerve after her close shave with the lions and so Danny tries to help her overcome her problems – the Leopard's Den lions have produced their first cub and he needs Alice back in the saddle.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: In his role as State Vet, Danny works with wealthy conservationist, Anton Ziegler, to catch a group of leopard hunters. Ziegler is also buying a tiger from Vanessa, who struggling with her finances, desperately needs the money to ensure Mara's future.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Du Plessis has started a one man campaign of vandalism against the new neighbours at Mara; Peeters and the mining company. When Peeters catches him on CCTV, Du Plessis is fined and given a restraining order to keep him away from Mara.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Du Plessis comes to meet Caroline's plane but he doesn't seem happy – he has seen that the mining company have already started building the road which threatens Leopard's Den.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family are making arrangements to leave Leopard's Den, all except Du Plessis who is steadfastly refusing to accept that he has lost his home. He won't use his share of the money from the sale of the land to buy somewhere else.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: The family have been squatting at Leopard's Den as they prepare to make their last stand to prevent the bulldozers from destroying their home. Du Plessis and Fatani bring elephants and a giraffe to dissuade the construction crew from moving in.

programme.title: Tales From The Crypt
programme.desc: A hooded crypt-keeper (Ralph Richardson) lets five sinners review their pasts before the final abyss.

programme.title: We Are the Flesh
programme.desc: After wandering a ruined city for years in search of food and shelter, two siblings find their way into one of the last remaining buildings. Inside, they find a man who will make them a dangerous offer to survive the outside world.

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When serial killer Charles Lee Ray is mortally wounded in a police shoot-out, he uses a voodoo spell to transfer his soul into Chucky, a Good Guys doll. Young Andy receives the doll as a birthday gift, and Chucky soon resumes his killing spree.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Love's Labours Lost
programme.desc: While listening to the radio, Bob observes his charmless young assistant Penny, inspiring him to recite odes about youth and innocence.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Dental Convention
programme.desc: The time for the annual dental convention has come. Bob is not keen on going when he sees that a colleague from his student days, Bernard Wiggins, a "loud mouthed big shot", is a featured speaker.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Discomfort of Strangers
programme.desc: Margaret fears that her relationship with Bob is getting stale after they have a petty argument.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Trick or Treat

programme.title: The Game: Breakthrough. Breakdown? Break-Through

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: If I Should Die...
programme.desc: Proven paranormal investigator Ken Arrington leads a new class of characters as they try to help a family cope with what appears to be a demonic spirit in their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, a young woman is found dead at a military base in Orange County, California. Using forensic genealogy, experts break open the 40-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a schoolteacher is gunned down in public, a known felon's DNA and phone records link him to the crime. After investigators arrest the man, they discover the real killer might actually be someone else entirely.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman discovers the bludgeoned body of her nephew, investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise. With three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother-of-two mysteriously disappears after spending the night at a local New Mexico bar. The police race against the clock to hopefully find her alive, and are shocked by what they uncover.

programme.title: Murder Maps: In The Shadow Of Jack
programme.desc: At the time of Jack The Ripper, London was home to some of the most terrible individuals the city has ever seen. One of the very worst was the elusive Borough Poisoner, George Chapman.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: It was a crime which shocked Britain. In 1878, a widow was killed in her own home, the killer was her own servant. For the young servant did not only kill and dismember her employer – she stole her clothes, her property and her identity.

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Lady Killer
programme.desc: As Europe recovered from the damage of WWII, soldiers made their way home from the front line. But one man, brought back all the savagery and brutality of the fighting.

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Blackout Ripper
programme.desc: It was WWII and London was rocked by the Blitz from the planes flying above. But down on the streets below another terrible danger lurked in the shadows. A serial killer was on the loose.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: In 1911, a gun battle on the streets of London, The Siege of Sidney Street the first breaking-news story in history.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: scienceNOW: What Will the Future Be Like?
programme.desc: The technologies that will transform our lives decades from now are already taking shape in laboratories around the world. Segments include: Humanoid Robots; Mind-Reading Machines; Augmented Reality; Profile - Adrien Treuille.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Wonders: What's the Universe Made Of?

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: From There To Here
programme.desc: Series introduction and the study of Earth from orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Crime Don't Pay
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble - or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Twisted Love
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado and they face a special challenge - getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Luv Still
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Day of the Dog
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Time to Cry
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow Dog turns to the fugitive's on-again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Up on the Roof

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hands on a Woodchipper

programme.desc: When Phil discovers more beaver activity on the Robertson land, he recruits Jase, Jep, and Si to get rid of them. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie bring Bella to her first day of karate practice.

programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Southern sweetheart Kelsie is madly in love with her online romeo, Brandon. But after years of endless excuses of why he cannot meet up, Kelsie recruits Nev and Max to go deep in the heart of Texas to find who Brandon really is.

programme.title: Aliens and the New World Order: The Cosmic Conspiracy
programme.desc: Did Ancient Aliens come to earth, create humans and control us throughout history? Jim Marrs explores our occulted history discovering how Ancient Aliens may still be in control today.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: On April 19, 1897, the Dallas Morning News reported a mysterious airship had crashed into a windmill in the nearby town of Aurora, Texas.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: It has long been suspected that Nazi leaders had more than a passing interesting in the occult and UFOs.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: On April 21st, 2008, one of the most talked-about incidents in modern UFO history opened a new chapter--the Phoenix Lights.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Mathewsons agree to sell a vintage threshing machine and collection of tractors, but extracting them from a Yorkshire farm proves a bigger job than anticipated.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Moskvich gets few admirers for style, but finds a home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a Mark 2 Jag and explains why they made such poor getaway cars for bank robbers. A customer considers a Morris Marina as a present for his wife.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a serious headache. In addition, they also buy an old French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1980s Sierra Cosworth draws in a crowd of Ford fans, while a restorer delights buyers with his 1966 Sunbeam Rapier and Sarah takes a shine to a caravan.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An impressive compound commandeered and repurposed by a brutal regime and an eerie complex off the coast of Ireland that became the biggest of its kind.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: British actor and author Tony Robinson uncovers machines that are unsung heroes, from a vehicle that makes airport runways safe for landing to atomic clocks keeping humankind on time.

programme.title: Tony Robinson's Marvellous Machines
programme.desc: British actor and author Tony Robinson meets mighty machines that do heavy lifting, from a vehicle that snatches superyachts out of the water to a bridge-building mechanical monster.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A now silent site that played a pivotal role defending the U.S. through the 20th century. Plus, a crumbling Italian fortress and a ghostly Ukrainian mansion.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A juggernaut of Soviet engineering which was crucial to the international space race. Deserted Scottish coastal defences and a complex that's crucial to American history.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: On shift with West Midlands Ambulance Service who treat a young lad with a fever, a golf-loving pensioner with a heart problem and a woman convinced she has lung cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: An asthmatic deteriorates rapidly in the ambulance, and the crews are called to a 30-year-old car that's been driven into a wall by a 90-year-old driver.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a woman whose legs have dramatically swollen, a girl having panic attacks, and a very ill and unconscious man.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews attend a HGV driver suffering dizzy spells and a woman who has fallen into a bush. They also move a man with a spinal injury who has no sensation from the neck down.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Joan is taking Sena to court after she gave away 5 cats she asked Sena to care for after Hurricane Sandy.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On Karamo, Bridgette caught her ex, Donnie, on the couch naked after being with another woman. Plus, Naiya says she helped raise her friend Mya's daughter. But now that Mya has a new man, Naiya believes she's been cast aside.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Kelly was adopted as a child and, while searching for her birth family, came across a woman who could be her biological sister; Sadie says that her boyfriend, Todd, has cheated on her, and he doubts the paternity of their 2-year-old son.

programme.title: The Maury Show: They're Back: Feuding Family Updates!
programme.desc: Some of our wildest guests return to give us some updates. Did the DNA results force these denying dads to step up? Did the lie detector results force these cheaters to become faithful?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On Karamo, Caitlyn and Aaron have been married for 5 years but claims things are rocky. Then, Shaneall and Traneall were just kids when their mother was murdered. The trauma they endured as children still divides them today.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Victoria discovered two people on social media. She believes them to be her long-lost brother and sister. They each have different mothers but share the same father. But Queecha and Vincent are not necessarily convinced they are family!

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A recycling plant needs two old portable cabins swapped out for new ones, making for some serious heavy lifting for Nick. Jim sees to an old Toyota abandoned in a live lane on the M1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jim and his team face a difficult foggy morning on the M1 when a crash between two artics causes a five-mile-long tailback.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Veteran driver Jim attends an emergency call-out to recover a lorry that has broken down bang in the middle of a busy ring road. Motor racing fanatic Merrie has a hunch she may have landed her dream job when she attends a broken down lorry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Steve and the team find themselves in deep water when they attempt to recover a car that has crashed into a river. Jim is tasked with recovering a van that has become wedged on top of a garden wall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: Steve battles rush hour traffic to manoeuvre his recovery vehicle around the narrow roads to get to a 7.5-tonne lorry out of a ditch, while Rory must deliver a dodgy van to a scrapyard for destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Palace

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Dreamers' good deeds lead to renewed friendship with the people of Arderial. But when they approach the Guardian Hyren of the realm, it senses the presence of the Core Hyren, and the two powerful creatures resume an ancient argument.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vow
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Magi-Nation

programme.title: The Wombles
programme.desc: Orinoco is shamed into exercising by a new weighing machine.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Dr Crumhorn holds Penfold captive and has created a robot duplicate of him (which is far more efficient than the original). At the push of a button, it transforms into a giant machine intent on destroying Danger Mouse and his pillar box.

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Count Duckula: Dr. Goosewing & Mr Duck

programme.title: Arthur: Bud's Knotty Problem/That’s MY Grandma!
programme.desc: When Bud falls in love with a snazzy new pair of boots, he might face his toughest adventure yet - learning to tie his shoes. D.W. gets jealous when Grandma Thora becomes the most popular babysitter in town.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Blankie/Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. has one little secret--her blankie. When it mysteriously disappears, Arthur is pressed into service. Find that blankie--or else! Next, the unbelievable has happened--Mr. Ratburn has gotten sick. And who's going to be the substitute?

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter
programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?

programme.title: Arthur: To Eat or Not to Eat/S.W.E.A.T.
programme.desc: A brand-new candy bar is in town! And what exactly is this ingredient called Tri-Enzomated Zorn Jelly, anyway? Then, it's time for the kids at Lakewood Elementary to take the "S.W.E.A.T” test and anxiety is running high.

programme.title: Arthur: No Acting Please/Prunella Deegan and the Disappointing Ending
programme.desc: When Fern lands a role in a community production, she fears she's not talented enough to be a star. Finally, the final volume of the Henry Screever series is out. Prunella and Marina compete to see who can finish the book the fastest.

programme.title: Arthur: Citizen Frensky/D.W.'S Backpack Mishap
programme.desc: After visiting The Elwood City Times, Francine decides to start her own paper--The Frensky Star! The tabloid is a success--until all her friends stop speaking to her. Somebody stole D.W.'s backpack!! Who is this fluffy unicorn thief?

programme.title: Arthur: Tales of Grotesquely Grim Bunny/Pet Projects
programme.desc: When the comic book store changes owners, the new darker comics are right up Fern's alley, but Arthur can't seem to stomach them. Arthur and Francine enter their pets to compete against each other in the "Perfect Pet" video contest.

programme.title: Arthur: I'm A Poet/The Scare-Your-Pants-Off Club
programme.desc: Challenged by Fern to enter a poetry contest, Arthur and his friends each write a poem to be judged by the famous poet Jack Prelutsky. Then, Arthur and his friends develop a consuming passion for the Scare-Your-Pants-Off books.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All Aboard
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Squares, Squares Everywhere
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Tracks
programme.desc: April O'Neil, ace reporter for Channel 6, investigates recent break-ins, allegedly by Ninjas, which have resulted in the thefts of numerous technologies.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Shredder
programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause. In order to rescue Splinter the Turtles must enter the Shredder's mobile fortress and brave its dangerous weaponry.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Thing about Rats
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman, a mad scientist, is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder experiments with the Inter-Dimensional Portal, hoping to contact Krang's' Rock Soldiers and prepare an invasion of Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder & Splintered
programme.desc: Shredder lures Splinter into the Technodrome, this time with the promise that a weapon in his possession can restore the sensei to human form.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Shredder
programme.desc: Shredder trains students at the Dojo for a crooked Turtles gang. The mock turtles' crime spree starts turning the public against Michelangelo, Raphael, Donatello and Leonardo.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Incredible Shrinking Turtles
programme.desc: In the first of a four-parter, the amazing amphibians search for the segments of the powerful crystal Eye of Sarnoth. Shredder cuts the Turtles down to size, literally.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): It Came from Beneath the Sewers
programme.desc: In the second of a four-parter about the pursuit of the Eye of Sarnoth, the Turtles are attacked by a huge alien plant that is making New York into a jungle.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mean Machines
programme.desc: The hunt for the Eye of Sarnoth continues in the third of a four-parter with the Turtles in Groucho-like disguises. Shredder hooks up a fragment of the Eye to the computer Omnus.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Curse of the Evil Eye
programme.desc: Shredder is in control of the Eye of Sarnoth, enabling him to transmute matter. Shredder brings to life a dragon which soars through the air with shocked shellbacks Leonardo and Michelangelo aboard.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Case of the Killer Pizzas
programme.desc: The Turtles' favourite food, pizza, is also the source of their problem. Nasty, fanged creatures have been planted in pizza boxes! When the critters crack open their chrysalises, they become enormous.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Antboy
programme.desc: 12-year-old Pelle is bitten by an ant and develops superpowers. Aided by comic book nerd Wilhelm, Pelle creates a secret identity as superhero Antboy.

programme.title: King of the Club: Part 8

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The C-11 Squad
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A bachelorette party at a rustic cabin in the mountains goes horribly wrong. A woman searches for the identity of her young son's elusive "friend".

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A man's childhood fears come to life when he returns to his family's farm after his mother's death. A woman begins to suspect that her withdrawn husband may be causing the unexplainable occurrences in their new home.

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A woman opens a dress shop in a Victorian home with a terrifying past. A man takes a job at a remote gas station in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A man lives in an abandoned bed and breakfast, while fixing it up as an investment property. A woman returns to the scene of a mysterious incident in search of answers.

programme.title: My Haunted House
programme.desc: A woman starts to mimic the bizarre behavior that led to her fiance's mysterious death. A couple experiences the horrifying legend of the Double Walker firsthand.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Linda and her sister discover an old rundown house in the woods with a murderous history; Carlos Mencia is nearly shot and killed when a spirit from his past comes to his rescue.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: We Live In A Car
programme.desc: Our guests say they're ready to come clean. Yolando regrets sleeping with her best friend’s boyfriend and Cameron has been hiding a secret from his roommates.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Homewreckers Confronted
programme.desc: Linda says her former best friend is trying to steal her man and she's fighting back! Then, Sherry wants her boyfriend Terry's wife Sandy and her family out of their lives!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Feisty One Night Stands
programme.desc: Sylvia loves one-night-stands and faces her angry sister Jackqueline for sleeping with her man! Then, Greg's one-night-stand left him doubting his long-term relationship!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I've Had Enough It's Over!
programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating Chango for six years! Next Mark's ex wants him back and even lied about a pregnancy. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Said She'd Drown the Baby
programme.desc: Devon slipped into a coma and is on life support. But before he fell into a coma, he told his mother that his ex Alisha said he did not father their son. Alisha denies ever saying this and feels his whole family has turned their backs on her.

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson investigate the legend of a supernatural hound, a beast that may be stalking a young heir on the fog-shrouded moorland that makes up his estate.

programme.title: Sherlock: A Case of Evil
programme.desc: This tale focuses on the young 20-something Sherlock Holmes. Sherlock is in pursuit of the evil Moriarty and apparently shoots him to death, but his body cannot be found as he falls in a sewer.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman mistakenly has her ball switched for a real croquet ball that kills a Parliament member.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes urgently tries to find the location of a bomb that was placed somewhere in London.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Brian O'Casey explains his story of the sweepstakes ticket, and the urgency to find the lost ticket.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay prepares dishes for the contestants to taste and re-create; a proposal is planned during the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final three chefs must prepare a meal for 100 people, including chefs from Los Angeles' finest restaurants.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The two finalists must work with an architect to design restaurant spaces for their final dinner service competition.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The two remaining contestants compete in the final dinner service; the winner of the head chef job in Atlantic City is chosen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay announces that the 16 contestants must successfully complete the opening dinner service, but he may be forced to eat his words.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The team with the most properly cooked eggs wins a helicopter tour of Los Angeles; when a chef gets into an argument with Ramsay, it threatens a team.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: An Officer and an Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS and 2 special guests investigate the Brunswick Old City Hall where an officer was shot and killedin the 1890's. Will TAPS discover that he's still on duty?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Textbook Case
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to an abandoned school in Barnegat, New Jersey. Could the apparition of a beloved community teacher be luring children inside the building or are other spirits at play?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: 200th Episode: Grant is Back
programme.desc: On this 2 hour special, TAPS celebrates their 200th episode by re-visiting one of their favorite and most haunted locations, Trans-Allegheny Lunatic Asylum and by calling on old friends, Grant, Dustin and Joe.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Phantoms of the Opera
programme.desc: On this special Halloween episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Ohio to investigate the Cincinnati Music Hall, a buildingwhere the hauntingsare as frequent as the performances.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Barrels of Boos
programme.desc: For Season 10's premiere episode, TAPS is heading back out on the American Whiskey Trail to investigate the Wild Turkey Distillery in Kentucky. It's believed that the spirits of founding family members are behind the activity there!

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Too Many Apparitions in the Kitchen
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the Culinary Institute of America in Hyde Park, New Yorkcalls in TAPS to find out if the spirits of Jesuit priests still roam the areas where they once lived, worked and were buried when it was a seminary.

programme.title: The Game: Breakthrough. Breakdown? Break-Through
programme.desc: An unhappy Melanie does some soul searching and concludes that she wants to finish her residency at John Hopkins.

programme.title: The Game: Move Trick, Get Out Of The Way
programme.desc: Melanie and Derwin butt heads during the Sabres champsionship game week while Malik gets in a heated dispute when picking Jenna up from rehab.

programme.title: The Game: The Championship Game Episode

programme.title: The Game: The Blueprint, Pt. 1

programme.title: The Game: The Blueprint, Pt. 2

programme.title: Moesha: Guess Q’s Coming To Dinner

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder

programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.desc: The legendary ghost hunters continue in Nottingham and a place where people could be jailed, sentenced and executed without even leaving the building.

programme.desc: Kerry Woolley’s family said she had everything - a loving husband and kids, nice house, smart car and a good job. So when she was gripped by alcoholism, they all rallied round to try and help Kerry get back on her feet.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Martyr
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Butterfly
programme.desc: The IMF attempts to clear an American businessman in Japan of false charges that he murdered his Japanese wife in "Butterfly," a segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Homecoming
programme.desc: Phelps returns to his hometown on personal business, only to find his once happy surroundings in a state of panic caused by a mysterious series of deaths of the young townswomen on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Rebel
programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killer
programme.desc: Robert Conrad guest stars as a professional assassin whom the Impossible Missions Force must prevent from Carrying out his assignment without knowing the identity of his target in "The Killer" segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out
programme.desc: Big Sis drops some bad news as the guys clash with Carolyn over a carnival unit at an auction in Long Beach. Ton and Allen unearth a Native American tomahawk, a dunk tank and a rare gun that can fire three shots at once.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Topeka
programme.desc: In 2002 in Topeka, Kansas, newly engaged Michael Sisco and Karen Harkness were brutally shot from the foot of their bed while they slept.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Greeley
programme.desc: In 2008, in Greeley, Colorado, aspiring model Angie Zapata was brutally beaten to death inside her city apartment. It was a crime rooted in deceit and betrayal.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Wellesley
programme.desc: In 1999, May Greineder was an ordinary homemaker in the upscale enclave of Wellesley. That is until May’s husband found her butchered body sprawled on a walking path.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: New Orleans
programme.desc: When cops found a “to do” list for murder in New Orleans sports reporter Vince Marinello’s home, the local celebrity went from prime time to prime suspect.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: “Brain on Fire” author Susannah Callahan, spent a fortune identifying what was making her ill. After a misdiagnosis, a simple test was administered, and the real source of her ailment was unveiled.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent Gilmer was described as a kind man before he shockingly murdered his father. But why did his behavior change?

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: The discovery of the body of a lighthouse keeper on the Scottish island of Little Ross in 1960 prompts a massive man hunt for his killer, assistant lighthouse keeper Robert Dickson.

programme.title: Killer Kids

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.
