programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: In the United States, a man desperately calls the police for help after he is attacked.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: In the US, a man desperately calls the police for help after he gets attacked; police work to crack the case using security footage and phone tracking; in the UK, a dog lover is found murdered in her rural home.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A businesswoman is in a whirlwind romance, but her newfound joy is cut short when her family finds her murdered; a bizarre confession reveals a deluded mind behind her death; in Northampton, England, a man with multiple stab wounds is discovered.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: In Florida, USA, a woman goes missing with a large sum of money; assuming foul play, the police are running out of time to find her, until someone is caught lying on camera; in the UK, the shocking murder of a woman in her own home sparks outrage.

programme.desc: A young mother is found unresponsive in bed, and her cause of death is determined to be an accidental heroin overdose, but her family has more questions than answers and launches their own investigation.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Honjo Masamune, Japan's greatest sword, vanished after WWII. Taken as a souvenir by a US Sergeant, it's now a legendary lost artifact sought by collectors worldwide.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A vast treasure of Spanish gold is buried somewhere in Texas. Dave Arnold, guided by a map, discovers three mysterious stones he believes are keys to the treasure. His 7-year quest leads to a mysterious death, financial ruin, and an ancient curse.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC
programme.desc: At an army testing lab where a super laser is being demonstrated, the crowd is surprised by the arrival of MACC, a robot from the year 2399 that talks like a cowboy from watching old western movies on inter-dimensional trips.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ninja Sword of Nowhere
programme.desc: Krang detects the existence of an alien metal that could help him conquer the Earth. It happens to be on a Ninja Sword the Turtles have purchased for Splinter as a National Sensei Appreciation Day gift.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): 20,000 Leaks Under the City
programme.desc: Krang is out to liquidate the Turtles by pumping water through the Earth's crust and into the sewer system. The super pump starts sucking up the entire ocean and soon the streets are covered with three feet of water.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader
programme.desc: Leonardo cannot take the pressure of being the leader of the Turtles anymore and leaves. Meanwhile, Krang and Shredder use their Solar Siphon to drain all the energy from the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Four Musketurtles
programme.desc: Leonardo becomes a little soft in the shell after he is knocked on the head. He thinks he is D' Artagan and that the other Turtles are the Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cowabunga Shredhead
programme.desc: With the aid of the Holographic Synthesizer, Shredder creates an exact likeness of Michelangelo and programs it to invade the Turtles' lair and destroy them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Turtle Snatchers
programme.desc: Donatello and Rocksteady are beamed up to a space ship - by little alien, Nikto, six thousand years old, traveling with his parents Klaatu and Barada.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Camera Bugged
programme.desc: The polarisoid, an alien tourist visiting Earth, causes all sorts of commotion with his camera which sucks everything it photos literally inside the camera, including City Hall.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Green with Jealousy
programme.desc: In order to steal nuclear energy from a submarine, Krang creates a love potion which induces lovesickness in all of the Turtles - except Donatello, who does not eat the potion-laced pizza.

programme.title: The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Action legends Jackie Chan and Arnold Schwarzenegger team up in this high concept fantasy historical epic. Set in the 18th century, English traveller Jonathan Green travels from Russia to China encountering dragons, black magic wizardry and a dragon king!

programme.title: Over the Top
programme.desc: A Championship title, a huge cash award, and his son's love -- the greatest prize of all -- are at stake when Hawk battles his strongest enemy for everything he has ever wanted.

programme.title: Zookeeper: Zookeeper (2011)
programme.desc: The animals at one particular zoo decide to break their code of silence in order to help their lovable zookeeper gain the attention of one particular woman.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The banks of the mighty Mississippi call the World Poker Tour back to where poker began for a prize pool of over one and a half million dollars - and it's the Devil's to lose.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Behind the velvet ropes, on the most famous street in the world, the Aviation Club de France opens its exclusive doors to the World Poker Tour for a battle of international proportions.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Gus Hansen, the daring young Dane who walked away with this year's World Poker Tour season opener returns to center stage -- for a chance to do the improbable -- reprise his inspiring performance and take his second major WPT title.

programme.title: The Greatest Inheritance
programme.desc: A group of estranged siblings return home to bury their mother and claim their rightful inheritance. They quickly discover she hid the deed to the entire estate, forcing them to work together and ultimately define their future.

programme.title: The Very Excellent Mr. Dundee
programme.desc: Paul Hogan, a retired actor who is constantly overshadowed by his character Crocodile Dundee, is reluctantly thrust back into the spotlight as he attempts to restore his sullied reputation on the eve of being awarded a knighthood by the Queen of England.

programme.title: Clockwatchers
programme.desc: The relationship between four female temps all working for the same credit company is threatened with the arrival of a new hire, who lands a permanent position one of the women was vying for.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A pair of losers marry two elderly sisters, thinking they'll inherit their fortune and Beverly Hills estate.

programme.title: The Quiet Man
programme.desc: An American ex-boxer returns to Ireland to win the hand of a spirited young woman. He is confronted by local customs and the woman's belligerent brother. Set in the verdant Irish countryside, this film has beautiful scenery and local charm.

programme.title: Bowery at Midnight
programme.desc: Kindly soup kitchen operator and professor of criminology, Karl Wagner, uses his soup kitchen as a front for a criminal gang. When things get out of hand, Wagner kills his henchmen, who wind up as zombies in the cellar of the soup kitchen.

programme.title: The Hunchback Of Notre Dame
programme.desc: In 15th-century Paris, the brother of the archdeacon plots with the gypsy king to foment a peasant revolt. Meanwhile, a freakish hunchback falls in love with the gypsy queen.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A starving boy inadvertently causes his sister, married to an Indian-hating Army officer, to reveal that she is an Indian.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Three drovers, imprisoned for trespassing by an exiled Prussian count, try to Americanize the nobleman and his fellow immigrants.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Mushy's attempts to save his 15-year-old cousin Posie from the clutches of a gambler ultimately involve all the drovers.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A doctor is mistrusted because she is a woman, fights prejudice, men, a quack and the law to save the life of a wounded drover.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: The sons of an American general and an Indian chief both disagree with their fathers on how to prevent a bloody war.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Abbotsford Killer
programme.desc: Two girls are attacked by a man armed with a baseball bat. One of them manages to escape but the second one is found in a salmon river. The killer nags the police for months until he leaves behind a telling clue.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: A kind-hearted fifth grader befriends a strange girl in her neighborhood. Little does she know that her good intentions will have life-altering consequences.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Death Spiral
programme.desc: Linda is hoping for love when she meets Jim, but his charm lasts only as long as he doesn't drink. Unable to stay sober, Jim becomes determined to keep Linda all to himself...even if it kills her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Good Vs Evil
programme.desc: When Jennifer Paulson rejects the advances of college classmate Jed, she unwittingly sets off a dangerous chain of events.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Sheila Taormina, an Olympic gold medalist, finds herself receiving strange phone calls and letters from a fellow athlete. Before long, he is following her around the country.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Out of Bounds
programme.desc: A friendly nurse offers odd jobs to a struggling man who quickly becomes infatuated with her. Despite her rejections to his advances, the married man will not take "no" for an answer.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: An overachieving teen finds herself in danger after her violent ex-boyfriend becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Teenage Obsession
programme.desc: When outgoing Cameron Wallace meets shy Ryan Clutter in a high school art class, they are only acquaintances. Little does she know that Ryan will stalk her for the next ten years.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: Based on the acclaimed novel. 1944: The D-Day landings have failed, and the German Wehrmacht has invaded Britain. The country is now under enemy occupation. In a remote valley in the Black Mountains of Wales, the women awake to discover the men are gone.

programme.title: The Big Fight
programme.desc: Tien Peng and Cheung Ching-ching play the leaders of a rebel group of Chinese kung fu fighters in a Japanese occupied town at the height of the war.

programme.title: Miami Supercops
programme.desc: Garret goes to Miami and gets murdered after 7 years in prison for a $20,000,000 bank robbery. The money and the 2 others were never found. The Trinity bros. go to Miami as cops to solve the case this time.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Her Fatal Flaw
programme.desc: Starring Victoria Pratt. A state's attorney learns that the primary suspect in one of the most politically explosive cases in Chicago history has a rock-solid alibi: Their one-night stand.

programme.title: Killer Infatuation
programme.desc: Mackenzie runs a killer-dedicated podcast with a large fan base. However, she begins living her own murder mystery, as she develops an infatuation with her impossibly attractive new neighbor, who was the prime suspect in a murder years ago.

programme.title: Dead at 17
programme.desc: Jason and his friends find themselves in trouble when a girl they are partying with is accidentally killed. In a panic, they hide her body. Worried that he would confess, two of the boys kill Jason and make it look like a suicide.

programme.title: Fighting The Sky
programme.desc: Researchers track down the origin of other-worldly sounds.

programme.title: Merlin and the War of the Dragons
programme.desc: An army of dragons invade the crippled English countryside and the apprentice wizard Merlin must confront the fire-breathing beasts.

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: Battle Beyond the Sun
programme.desc: Two countries race to have the first successful landing on Mars.

programme.title: Moondance Alexander
programme.desc: When a Pinto pony named Checkers leaps into her life, Moondance is convinced that Checkers has champion potential and enters him in the Bow Valley Classic. She soon learns that only perseverance lands you in the winner's circle.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: Saving Winston
programme.desc: A troubled teen is forced to leave her life of crime and assigned to the care of her aunt on a horse farm. She discovers an abandoned horse and nurses him back to health. Will her newfound love of life and a rescue horse help her find salvation?

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Big Bang Theory, Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: (S03E030) Peter bails Michael out of jail. He explains that he only served a few days of jail time, and asks Michael to testify on his behalf before the medical board.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Postmortem Madness
programme.desc: (S04E001) Kimberly sets off her bombs, destroying half of the building. MacKenzie suffers a fatal heart attack. Billy breaks down Alison's door and pulls her to safety, although she is blinded by the blast.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Melrose is Like A Box Of Chocolate
programme.desc: (S04E002) Jane, Sydney, and Jo get temporary roommates while the building is repaired. Jake goes on a drinking binge in the aftermath of his brother's death.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Blind Ambition
programme.desc: (S04E003) Alison regains her sight during a client party. Jane convinces her to keep the news to herself, as Brooke is only allowing her near Billy out of pity. Brooke snoops in Amanda's office and discovers a Florida driver's license for Amanda Parezi.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance runs through a number of different scenarios, trying to find one in which her crewmates don't die.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Risk-All Point
programme.desc: A more powerful Andromeda ship explodes due to likely sabotage, forcing Dylan's crew to save them.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Right Horse
programme.desc: Beka endangers both her crew and an entire planet when a former love shows up.

programme.title: Andromeda: What Happens to a Rev Deferred?
programme.desc: The Andromeda receives a cry for help from Rev Bam.

programme.title: Andromeda: Point of the Spear
programme.desc: After a Commonwealth planet is attacked by Pyrian pyroformers, Dylan is forced to fight to protect the new planet.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark brings a city to a standstill with his load, and Yogi is on an antiques roadshow.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sharon has to move a copper mountain and Sludge must shift a freight of flammable liquid,

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Turbo pushes his luck, and his truck, as he tries to go the distance and deliver his load.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame has double bad luck during a brutal lap through the red centre.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Graham's race through the desert takes a sudden turn from make to break.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Kurt loses his way hauling a hut across Australia.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: New Year's Eve at Leopard's Den. Alice has returned, but the stress of combining work with caring for baby Bobby is causing tension between her and Danny. Liv is furious that Fatani hasn't told his mother about their relationship.

programme.title: Wild At Heart
programme.desc: Danny is having second thoughts about the wisdom of uprooting his new family and ploughing all their money into a business venture that they know next to nothing about.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Work To Do
programme.desc: A successful giraffe capture means everyone is in high spirits, until the arrival of Evan and Olivia's real father, Simon, throws the family into turmoil.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Meerly Evan
programme.desc: Evan lets the mischievous meerkats loose in Rosie's room to cause havoc. Rosie is devastated when they destroy an irreplaceable photograph of her mother and rages at Evan. She decides once and for all to go back to Bristol.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Evan Meets Elli
programme.desc: Rogue young male elephants are rampaging through Leopard's Den and destroying everything the family have built, so Danny introduces a matriarch elephant in the hope that she will calm them down.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Dawn Feeling
programme.desc: At a typically rowdy family breakfast, Rosie is excitedly looking forward to the arrival of her friend Izzy, whilst Danny is concerned about the rumour of ivory poachers in the area. Unnoticed, Miranda the lion cub pads off into the bush.

programme.title: Lost Creek
programme.desc: After moving to a new town, 11-year-old Peter and his friend Bill must team up with mysterious new girl Maggie and brave the woods on Halloween to face a monster born from their nightmares.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre The Werewolf of Washington
programme.desc: While on assignment in Hungary, a young reporter is attacked by a mysterious animal. (1981)

programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein escapes from the guillotine and goes to Germany. There, he names himself Dr. Stein and plans to restart his experiments by using parts of dead bodies.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s niece has to be retrieved by Garfield and Odie. Garfield gets confidence from a motivational speaker.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Irwin the Mouse wants to be cast and Garfield lets him be one. Wade visits the Sage on a mountain to see how to overcome his fears.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: The ancestor of one of the most hungry pirates sets sail. Philo is back to help give motivational speeches to the weasel and Wade.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Jon try to help out a sultan. Orson’s imagination takes Wade and Roy on an out-of-this-world experience.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s new next-door neighbor is a cat hater and Garfield has to find out why. All of the farmyards are caught in a repeating cycle of zany bits.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie go sailing on Jon’s new boat and a shark shows up. Michael can’t scare anyone until he enters the farmyard.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon gets to meet Vivacia, the TV horror show hostess of his dreams. Wade Duck is caught in a 60-minute style interview.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Peace and Quiet/U.S Acres:Wanted Wade/Garfield Goes Hawaiian
programme.desc: Garfield's morning nap is disturbed by Binky the Clown./Wade accidentally pulls the tag off a couch pillow./When Garfield gets the Hawaiian flue.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Box O' Fun/U.S Acres: Unidentified Flying Orson/School Daze
programme.desc: Garfield plays in an empty cardboard box./Orson's science fiction book inspires Roy to play a trick./Jon sends Garfield to a school for cats run by an ex-Marine.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Problems
programme.desc: At her clinic one-day, Margaret sees an old school chum, and invites her and her husband Matt to dinner.

programme.title: On the Case: A Dream Shattered
programme.desc: When a young teacher fails to show up for work, her principal goes looking for her at her home, where he makes a shocking discovery. The case would go cold until DNA technology helps police track down her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Desperate Cry
programme.desc: A mother's desperate cry for help alerts neighbors and leads to a terrifying discovery.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 1
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On The Case.

programme.title: On the Case: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: John Greathouse finds his stepdaughter, Kelli Bailey, murdered in her bedroom; investigators find a video tape and a dead man's forged check and hope these clues will be the keys to bringing Bailey's cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: A Mystery on Cherry Hill
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman vanishes without a trace, it may take another tragedy before police will be able to solve the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: Twisted Obsession
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is found murdered out in the New Mexico wilderness, police must unravel her killer's twisted obsession in order to solve the crime.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: The Man Who Sold The World (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante and Luc leave the ship to track down a ruthless war criminal, Percy discovers an invasion of the Tulip by a deadly AI.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Peer Pressure (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante brings a captive fugitive aboard, along with her teenage son, Ajit. Percy and Ajit's immediate attraction sparks a conflict which endangers everyone.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Frozen (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante must decide whether to save a scientist and his son from the clutches of the Raiders, or use them as a bargaining chip to find his own child.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Past Lives (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante's crew capture an alleged murderer, wanted by The Orchard, who turns out to be Luc's ex-husband. Luc is left with only terrible options.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Family Values (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante and Luc capture a Raider, Dante is caught between his sense of justice and his desire for vengeance.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Cell Game (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante loses Percy to corrupt Oberon police, he must work out a dangerous deal to free Percy, while she fights for her life in prison.

programme.title: A Christmas Karen
programme.desc: Karen is an entitled middle-aged woman whose demanding nature has alienated her loved ones. After a series of instances displaying her privilege, Karen receives an intervention from some unconventional spirits.

programme.title: A Christmas Village
programme.desc: To save her reputation, Piper Jensen, a public relations genius and owner of her own PR company, agrees to work for the owner of a failing Santa’s Village and discovers love and how magical Christmas is after all.

programme.title: Pee-wee's Playhouse Christmas Special
programme.desc: Pee-Wee Herman throws a Christmas party at his playhouse with his friends and some celebrity guests.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Blind Leading The Blind Date
programme.desc: When Dani reveals she's depressed that she'll be the only single one at her high school reunion, Oscar and Felix each put their distinctive dating strategies to work to help her find a boyfriend.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Wedding Deception
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix attend the wedding of an old college friend, Oscar aims to reconnect with an old flame while Felix is determined to show his ex-wife (guest star Christine Woods) that he's a changed man.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Heal Thyself

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Secret Agent Man
programme.desc: Felix convinces Oscar to appear on a sports television show against Teddy's advice to stick with radio. NFL Network's Rich Eisen and 'Inside the NBA on TNT's' Kenny Smith guest star as themselves.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Unger Games
programme.desc: When Oscar feels threatened by Felix's surprising performance on the softball field and basketball court, they agree to a decathlon to determine which one of them is the better athlete. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Sleeping Dogs Lie
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix make a trip to Ashley's (Christine Woods) to retrieve Felix's special pillow, a secret that he has kept from Oscar is revealed. Five-time NBA All-Star Chris Webber guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Enlightening Strikes
programme.desc: When Felix substitute teaches a yoga class, his teaching style rubs everyone, including Emily, the wrong way. Weird Al Yankovic and Regis Philbin guest star.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Jealous Island
programme.desc: Oscar becomes obsessed with living up to Murph's (Geoff Stults) standards when he finds out the girl he is seeing used to date the handsome ex-baseball player.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Audit Couple
programme.desc: When the IRS decides to audit Oscar and his ex-wife Gaby, Felix offers to mediate between the contentious exes when he realizes that he might be the reason Oscar was audited in the first place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All About Eavesdropping
programme.desc: After Oscar and Felix become obsessed with eavesdropping on their bickering neighbors, they try to subtly intervene and help them save their marriage.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Unger The Influence
programme.desc: With the help of Murph, Oscar decides to throw a big party when Felix finally agrees to spend the weekend away. Also, Felix and Emily have their first sleepover.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a director at an 'Astro Quest' convention.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.desc: Korey says his girlfriend Dominique is a cheater and his suspicions about her job have caused major problems in their relationship. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin is unfaithful!

programme.desc: Ramsay tests the chefs' ability to identify flavours and ingredients by asking them to re-create one of his specialities, but a contestant becomes overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night

programme.desc: TAPS is revisiting Edith Wharton's home, The Mount, in Lenox, Massachusetts. It's believed Edith andher husband could be behind increased activity since the team's last investigation in 2008.

programme.desc: This historic roundhouse and rail yard is connected to more that just old trains. The frightening remnants of a serial killer, horrific accidents and one of the worst train crashes have two people questioning strange encounters.

programme.desc: An armory that's been standing for over 100 years harbors a ghostly mystery. Recent female leadership is coinciding with increased paranormal activity.

programme.desc: Kim’s trapped in a love triangle and Nikki’s wooed by a younger man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Connection
programme.desc: P.R.S. is called in to help a young mother tormented by an otherworldly connection to a teenage girl murdered in her neighborhood years ago. Could she have psychic ability or is there a more sinister force at work?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Knottingley Town Hall
programme.desc: This location is said to be overflowing with paranormal activity, which doesn’t disappoint.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Capesthorne Hall
programme.desc: The beauty of this magnificent Cheshire country house hides the horror that lies in its corridors. As well a poltergeist activity the team manage to catch some of their best evidence to date and even our sceptic hears noises.

programme.title: Most Haunted: 30 East Drive_PT1
programme.desc: 30 East Drive is said to house the most violent poltergeist in the world. The team go head first into what becomes their toughest challenge yet. As soon as they enter the property something is waiting and wants to be known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: 30 East Drive_PT2
programme.desc: The team continue their most threatening investigation yet and for some they will be scared for life mentally and physically. The most violent poltergeist in the world is ready for a fight...but who wins?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Thackray Museum
programme.desc: The medical museum houses a great many objects from its distant hospital and workhouse past with a complete Victorian street scene on the lower level.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Murder By Mail: Keith Cottingham
programme.desc: In 1984 a parcel bomb was sent to a 53-year-old grandmother living in a tranquil English village. She died of horrific injuries. No one understood why it had happened. The only evidence detectives had was the bomb itself.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Test

programme.title: Dynasty: The Surgery

programme.title: Dynasty: The Garage

programme.title: Dynasty: The Shower
programme.desc: Adam continues to slip further away from Dana and his family, as doubts to his Carrington heritage have their effect; Alexis ends her relationship with Michael Culhane.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Catafalque
programme.desc: With the threat of another off-shore missile crisis and perhaps a confrontation that could lead to war, the IMF is called upon to expose a nuclear arms treaty secretly signed by a previously friendly country and a hostile power in "The Catafalque"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Squeeze Play
programme.desc: A leading illegal supplier of heroin is dying of cancer and is about to designate a successor and turn over to him the only known list containing all the vital information about the entire drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Merchant
programme.desc: George Sanders guest stars, one of the world's largest dealers in illegal arms, who is about to complete a deal involving guerilla groups in North Africa and the Middle East in "The Merchant"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cat's Paw
programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Hostage
programme.desc: Paris, still in his cover from a completed mission, is kidnapped and held hostage by a group of treacherous revolutionists in "The Hostage" on Paramount Television's award-winning series "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails
programme.desc: CJ seeks to disrupt Allen's search for serenity at a storage auction before the guy's head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip n' slide, and a bed of nails.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time
programme.desc: Ton and Allen discover that owning a pawn shop is way more trouble than they expected. With bills stacking up, even an antique ammo collection and some classic football helmets may not be enough to put the guys in the black.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Chance Encounter

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: Searching for answers from her own troubled past, one woman sets out on a journey to uncover the identities of four unidentified bodies found inside barrels in the woods, a mystery that had plagued law enforcement for years.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: A young man leaves home for the corner store but dies on a rainy pavement just down the street. While bystanders claim that he fell off his bike, his mum and sister do not buy it and hit the streets to find answers.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: When a college student was found dead in rural Quebec, police refused to call it a murder, but years later, her brother continues his own investigation into her death. On the eve of a trip to return to the scene of the crime, tragedy strikes again.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: A young girl's life was thrown into chaos when her single mother died by a gunshot wound in their remote mountain home. The journey for the truth will be long and arduous, and it'll be thirty years until justice is finally served.

programme.title: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: A young man whose childhood is marked by tragedy learns of a relatively unknown serial killer and finds himself thinking about unidentified victims. It isn't long before that the pursuit becomes a full-time job and identifying victims an obsession.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: After disappearing months earlier, the skull of Victoria Couchman was found in St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex. Her controlling father became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Return of the Dead

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Possessed
programme.desc: A teen’s risky ghost fixation grows, while a war vet almost destroys a family.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Speak

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Home Possession
programme.desc: Learn how three families are dealing with properties overrun by ghosts.

programme.title: The Case: The Bloody Cave (Boris Verièrres)
programme.desc: Patrick Isoird was found on July 17, 2014 in a cave near Sète, bound hand and foot, his body burned. Commander Boris Verrières investigated what looks like a "crime of self-esteem".

programme.title: The Case: The Fugitive (Estelle Vaucher-Grondin)
programme.desc: Estelle Vaucher-Grondin, a gendarmerie investigator, explores leads that may allow her to find Félicien Kabouga, accused of being the financier of the Rwandan genocide.

programme.title: The Case: The Diamond Thief (Frédéric Mas)
programme.desc: On November 20, 2008, Frédéric Mas was entrusted with a case that marked him... a big hit. The famous jeweler Cartier was the victim of a clever theft.

programme.title: The Case: The Roissy Bagger (Amaury de Hauteclocque)

programme.title: The Case: Lupine Arsene of the Palaces
programme.desc: A breathtaking international investigation worthy of the blockbuster “Catch Me If You Can.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: For six decades, police work to identify the person who murdered a 9-year-old girl.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Police spend decades trying to identify a baby whose body was discovered in 1982.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Police work to identify the perpetrator of a brutal murder from 1980.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, a man discovered the body of a young woman in a roadside ditch in Kentucky. She would be identified as 16-year-old Carol Sue Klaber, last seen riding her bike before her brutal murder.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In October 1970, in Sacramento, California, 28-year-old court reporter Nancy Bennallack fails to show up for work, leaving colleagues worried and someone to find her body stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: December 2000: 19-year-old Rachel Manning was murdered in Milton Keynes. Two men were wrongfully convicted, but new advances in forensics proved that evil always leaves a trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of a child is found, Boston State Police have no leads, but with the help of the National Centre for Missing and Exploited Children, a trace is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Edinburgh, October 1977: Christine Eadie and Helen Scott vanish without a trace. The police never stopped hunting for justice, even changing the law to bring the perpetrators to account.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In late 1992, an attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. Over time, DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Presence
programme.desc: Sarah Miller believes that something supernatural in her home is terrorizing her children.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hungry Ghosts

programme.title: A Haunting: Black Magic

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghostly Voices
programme.desc: Angelina Balistreri believes her home is haunted by a harmless ghost, while her husband, Emiliano, is skeptical of the paranormal. They call in a priest and medium who makes contact with a troubled ghost and helps him cross over and find peace.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Sean Vincent Gillis from Louisiana was arrested on suspicion of killing five women, but during police questioning, he ultimately confessed to the brutal murders of three more people.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of a kind-hearted single mother points to three suspects, all claiming innocence.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In 1981, a mother vanishes from the Hernando woods and the case goes cold. Thirty-three years later, local detectives reopen the investigation, only to discover that getting a confession may be the only way to solve the case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: An accidental death in upstate New York becomes a possible murder scene, and a wife and mother provides a crucial piece of evidence. Investigators confront the darkest side of humanity to discover an unspeakable truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect. A risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer, a cat-and-mouse game ensues to get inside his mind and have him lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Arthur: Paradise Lost/The Pride of Lakewood
programme.desc: Baby Kate is growing up! But strangely enough, the more words she learns, the less she seems to understand their dog. To boost school spirit, Arthur and his classmates form the Lakewood Pride Committee, but not everyone wants to join.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's New Puppy/Arthur Bounces Back
programme.desc: Arthur's new puppy is exactly what he wanted. He's cute and wriggly, and he follows Arthur everywhere. But training a puppy is harder than Arthur thought. Then, a mere $10 stands between Arthur and the shoes he's been dreaming about.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Chicken Pox/Sick As A Dog
programme.desc: The circus is in town and the whole family's excited—until Arthur gets CHICKEN POX! Will he recover in time? Then, Arthur's worst fears come true when poor, sick Pal has to sleep overnight at the vet's office. Could it be something he did?

programme.title: Arthur: The Chips Are Down/Revenge Of The Chip
programme.desc: What a mysterious, beautiful thing a green potato chip is--and D.W. just ate a gigantic one! But then she hears a rumor that they're poisonous...Sure, kids do some pretty embarrassing things, but do Moms have to tell everyone?

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Tent of Portent/Mutiny on the Pitch
programme.desc: At the Elwood City Picnic, Prunella pretends she can see the future at her fortune telling booth. The Lakewood Elementary soccer team has had enough of Francine's bossy behavior.

programme.title: Arthur: Vomitrocious!/Sue Ellen Chickens Out
programme.desc: It's just a regular day until Francine starts to feel queasy, and then throws up in the cafeteria! Now Francine is afraid to go back to school. And, Sue Ellen learns that a fast-food chain is taking over the beloved Sugar Bowl.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Stray Netkitin/Bats in the Belfry
programme.desc: D.W. is panicked when a virus ruins the Read family computer. Who will take care of her virtual pet? Arthur and D.W. are thrilled when Grandma Thora lets them turn her attic into a clubhouse. But will a bat threaten their new play space?

programme.title: Arthur: Fernfern and the Secret of Moose Mountain/Thanks a Lot, Binky
programme.desc: Fern can't wait to climb Moose Mountain so that she can have adventures like Zutzut, the famous comic-book hero! Then, Binky decides to become "No More Mr. Nice Guy" after not getting thanked for saving Rattles from a dangerous stunt.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Second Chance/Arthur and the Whole Truth
programme.desc: With the help of a little time travel, Buster turns back the clock to see what his life would be like if he were a genius. Arthur isn't happy when he discovers that Buster has been telling him some white lies, just to spare his feelings.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop get into a debate of which is better: the sun or the wind. Rachel learns that the park is not only a place to come and play but it's also the home of many different creatures.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.
